topic_name: 36_philips hue turn_hue turn lights_change hue lights_turn hue light
topic_text: When New Ring Detected from Ring, do Start recording using Arlo. If Ring doorbell is rung, then Arlo records for 30 seconds. This helps when your Arlo is set up near your doorbell but is not activating quickly enough to catch the full event on it's ownInstead of waiting for Arlo's motion sensor to catch the movement or raising it and risking false alarms, you're using the doorbell as that trigger.You'll be able to select which doorbell triggers this (in the event you have multiple doorbells) and which Arlo camera to record withYou can also choose to record for 10, 30, or 60 seconds.
